memograph.comment: MemoGraph MCP Server - 19 tools available: search_vault, create_memory, query_with_context, get_vault_info, get_vault_stats, list_memories, get_memory, import_document, delete_memory, update_memory, list_available_tools, auto_hook_query, auto_hook_response, configure_autonomous_mode, get_autonomous_config, relate_memories, search_by_graph, find_path, bulk_create. LLM provider is optional - if not set, context is returned for Cline to use. To enable answer generation in MemoGraph, add: MEMOGRAPH_PROVIDER=ollama and MEMOGRAPH_MODEL=llama3.1:latest.
